fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({quote_id: $('Build Approval URLs').item.json.quote_id, estimate_total: $('Build Approval URLs').item.json.estimate_total}) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your Apex Windows Quote - $' + parseFloat($json.final_total).toFixed(2) + ' | Please Review' }}
={{ 'Quote Sent | ' + $('Set Final Total').item.json.lead_name + ' | $' + parseFloat($('Set Final Total').item.json.final_total).toFixed(2) }}
parameters.html:
={{ `
Apex Windows TX
Quote Sent to Customer
INTERNAL • STAFF ONLY

A quote has been sent and is awaiting the customer's decision.

Customer${$('Set Final Total').item.json.lead_name}
Email${$('Set Final Total').item.json.lead_email}
Quote Total$${parseFloat($('Set Final Total').item.json.final_total).toFixed(2)}
Quote ID${$('Set Final Total').item.json.quote_id}
Approved By${$('Set Final Total').item.json.approved_by}
⏰ An escalation alert will fire in 72 hours if no response is received.
Apex Windows TX Automation  •  Internal Notification  •  [TEST EMAIL]
` }}

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({quote_id: $('Set Final Total').item.json.quote_id, approved_by: $('Set Final Total').item.json.approved_by, total: $('Set Final Total').item.json.final_total}) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Quote Accepted | $' + parseFloat($('Validate Token').item.json.total_amount).toFixed(2) + ' | Action Required: Schedule Now' }}
parameters.html:
={{ `
Apex Windows TX
Quote Accepted — Action Required
INTERNAL • STAFF ONLY
✓ ACTION REQUIRED: Call the customer to schedule the job.
Quote ID${$('Validate Token').item.json.id}
Quote Amount$${parseFloat($('Validate Token').item.json.total_amount).toFixed(2)}
Lead ID${$('Validate Token').item.json.lead_id}
Approved By${$('Validate Token').item.json.approved_by || 'N/A'}

Next Steps

  1. Call the customer to confirm a convenient appointment date.
  2. Update the pipeline to Scheduled once confirmed.
  3. Trigger /webhook/job-completed when the job is complete.
Apex Windows TX Automation  •  Internal Notification  •  [TEST EMAIL]
` }}

parameters.subject: Your Apex Windows Service is Confirmed | What Happens Next
parameters.html:
={{ '

Apex Windows TX

Your Booking is Confirmed

Hi there,

Thank you for accepting your quote of $' + parseFloat($('Validate Token').item.json.total_amount || 0).toFixed(2) + '. We are on it!

What happens next:

  1. We will call you within 24 hours to schedule your appointment at a time that works for you.
  2. Our technician arrives and completes the window replacement.
  3. An invoice will be sent after the job is done. You can pay securely online via the link in the invoice email.

Questions? Call 214-555-0100 or reply to this email.

Thank you for choosing Apex Windows TX!

[TEST EMAIL] - Apex Windows TX Automation

' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Invoice #' + $('Set Stripe Payment URL').item.json.invoice_number + ' | Due ' + $('Set Stripe Payment URL').item.json.due_date }}
parameters.html:
={{ '

Apex Windows TX

Your Invoice is Ready

Hi there,

Your Apex Windows service has been completed. Please find your invoice details below.

Invoice #' + $('Set Stripe Payment URL').item.json.invoice_number + '
Amount Due$' + parseFloat($('Create Invoice').item.json.amount_due || 0).toFixed(2) + '
Due Date' + $('Set Stripe Payment URL').item.json.due_date + '
Pay Now Securely

If the button does not work, copy this link: ' + $('Set Stripe Payment URL').item.json.stripe_payment_url + '

Thank you for choosing Apex Windows TX | [TEST EMAIL]

' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Partial Payment | Invoice #' + $('Handle Partial Payment').item.json.invoice_number }}
parameters.html:
={{ `
Apex Windows TX
Partial Payment Received
INTERNAL • STAFF ONLY
⚠ FOLLOW UP REQUIRED: Collect the outstanding balance.
Invoice #${$('Handle Partial Payment').item.json.invoice_number}
Amount Paid$${parseFloat($('Handle Partial Payment').item.json.amount_paid || 0).toFixed(2)}
Balance Remaining$${parseFloat($('Handle Partial Payment').item.json.balance || 0).toFixed(2)}
Payment Method${$('Handle Partial Payment').item.json.payment_method || 'N/A'}

Please contact the customer to arrange payment of the outstanding balance.

Apex Windows TX Automation  •  Internal Notification
` }}

parameters.subject: Payment Received | Thank You from Apex Windows TX
parameters.html:
={{ '

Apex Windows TX

Payment Received - Thank You!

Hi there,

We have received your payment. Thank you for choosing Apex Windows TX!

Invoice #' + $('Payment Check Data').item.json.invoice_number + '
Amount Paid$' + parseFloat($('Payment Check Data').item.json.amount_paid || 0).toFixed(2) + '
Payment Method' + ($('Payment Check Data').item.json.payment_method || '').charAt(0).toUpperCase() + ($('Payment Check Data').item.json.payment_method || '').slice(1) + '

We hope you are enjoying your clear windows! If you need any future service, do not hesitate to reach out.

We would love your feedback - leaving us a Google Review helps other homeowners find trusted window service.

Thank you from Apex Windows TX | [TEST EMAIL]

' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'CLOSED WON | Invoice #' + $('Payment Check Data').item.json.invoice_number + ' | $' + parseFloat($('Payment Check Data').item.json.amount_paid || 0).toFixed(2) + ' received' }}
parameters.html:
={{ `
Apex Windows TX
Closed Won — Full Payment Received
INTERNAL • STAFF ONLY
🎉 Payment confirmed. All escalations resolved. WF3 triggered.
Invoice #${$('Payment Check Data').item.json.invoice_number}
Amount Received$${parseFloat($('Payment Check Data').item.json.amount_paid || 0).toFixed(2)}
Payment Method${$('Payment Check Data').item.json.payment_method}
Transaction ID${$('Payment Check Data').item.json.transaction_id}
Lead ID${$('Payment Check Data').item.json.lead_id}
Apex Windows TX Automation  •  Internal Notification  •  [TEST EMAIL]
` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({lead_id: $('Payment Check Data').item.json.lead_id,lead_email: $('Update Pipeline - Closed Won').item.json.email,lead_name: $('Update Pipeline - Closed Won').item.json.name,amount_paid: $('Payment Check Data').item.json.amount_paid}) }}

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ invoice_number: $('Payment Check Data').item.json.invoice_number, amount_paid: $('Payment Check Data').item.json.amount_paid, payment_method: $('Payment Check Data').item.json.payment_method, wf3_triggered: true }) }}

parameters.name: after_completion[hosted_confirmation][custom_message]
parameters.value: Thank you! Your payment has been received by Apex Windows TX. We appreciate your business!

parameters.responseBody:
Apex Windows TX

Professional Window Services - Dallas-Fort Worth

✓

Quote Accepted - Thank You!

We have received your confirmation. A member of our team will be in touch within 1-2 business days to schedule your window service.

What Happens Next

1. We will contact you to confirm a convenient installation date.

2. No preparation needed on your end unless we advise otherwise.

3. After the job is complete, you will receive an invoice for the agreed amount.

Have questions? Call 214-555-0100 or email sales-manager@example.com

Apex Windows TX  |  apexwindowstx.com  |  Dallas-Fort Worth, TX

Apex Windows TX

Professional Window Services - Dallas-Fort Worth

👋

No Problem at All

We have received your response. Your quote has been marked as declined and no further action will be taken.

If you change your mind or would like to discuss your options, please do not hesitate to reach out. There is absolutely no obligation.

Reconsidering? Call 214-555-0100 or email sales-manager@example.com

Apex Windows TX  |  apexwindowstx.com  |  Dallas-Fort Worth, TX

The customer landing page has already shown a polite decline message. No further automated action will occur.

` }}
